fullName:
com.blockether.spel.snapshot-test.Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks..position with viewport changes.elements reflow to new positions when viewport shrinks
name:
Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > position with viewport changes > elements reflow to new positions when viewport shrinks
